name: Fool Yourself Cookies/Low Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the peanut butter, low-cal hot chocolate mix, mashed banana, and oatmeal together with a fork until well combined.
2. Form the mixture into six cookie-sized balls.
3. Place the cookies on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes.
